paragraphs: ISBR Powered by Emversity admission2025 is based on entrance exam scores. The institute offers PGDM and MBA courses at the PG level in collaboration withISBR. To get admitted to ISBR Powered by Emversity, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The PGDM inHealthcare Managementis the flagship course of the institute. The application process atISBR Powered by Emversityis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutISBR Powered by Emversity course admission2025.

ISBR Powered by Emversity courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. The candidates should get a minimum score of 50 percentile in the CAT, 500 in GMAT, or equivalent scores in other exams. Candidates with scores below these thresholds will still be considered based on other criteria, such as academic performance and interview performance. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularISBR Powered by Emversity courses:
Graduate in any stream form from a recognised university with 50% aggregate in any 3 or 4 year UG degree (45% for ST/SC)

Download:ISBR Healthcare Management Brochure (2025)

ISBR Powered by Emversity admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at ISBR Powered by Emversity is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: ISBR Powered by Emversity Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the institute's official website, i.e., https://emversity.com/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

Primary Communication: An email will be sent to each candidate’s registered email address to convey the admission decision as well as share the provisional offer letter. This email serves as the official notification of selection status and includes critical next steps.
Acceptance Email: For selected candidates, the acceptance email will contain details on program orientation, enrollment procedures, and the deadline to confirm admission.
STEP 3: Offer Letter and Enrollment Guide

Digital Offer Letter: Selected candidates will receive an official digital provisional offer letter attached to their acceptance email. This letter formalizes their admission offer and outlines important program details, such as start dates and academic requirements.

Enrollment Guide: Along with the offer letter, students will receive an enrollment guide with instructions on how to register, pay fees, and access the online learning portal. It also covers how to connect with academic advisors and register for courses.
STEP 4: Release of Provisional Offer Letter
Applicants are notified of their admission status via email during this period. Selected students receive a provisional official offer letter, with guidance on enrollment steps.
STEP 5: Registration Confirmation Deadline:

Accepted candidates must confirm their enrollment by this date by submitting their Registration Fee and Acceptance Form. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theISBR Powered by Emversity feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

overview_faqs.question: Can Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Architecture & Planning, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.4 on campuslife, 3.8 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Batch summary and placement insight CSE (2020-24).

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of eligible students got placed from CSE batch. The highest package is 24 LPA by a top product-based company, often international/remote. Average package is 4.5 LPA - 5.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.4 LPA - 3 LPA. Mostly service-based or regional companies visit for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are located within the campus offering single and shared occupancy. Rooms are clean, well-ventilated, and furnished with basic necessities like a bed, study table, and wardrobe. The hostel mess provides hygienic food. It provides vegetarian food with a variety of North Indian, South Indian, and Gujarati dishes. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet available in academic blocks and hostels, supporting seamless learning and research. University offers state-of-the-art laboratory for all departments, including well-equipped computer labs and electronic labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI).

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is high. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA in the AI ML course. The top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Flipkart, BML, Google, and TEDx. The top roles offered in the AI/ML course are manager, HOD, HR, and employee.
content.Infrastructure: The best fast-speed Wi-Fi is available on my campus and only available in hostels. It has the best future labs. AC classrooms are available and it also has digital classrooms. The library is available, and on two floors, a maximum of 1,000 students are available at the same time. All Indian food-style canteens are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied with college in terms of studying.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in our college. The highest package is 60 LPA, and the lowest package is 30 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Flipkart, IBM, Google, and Infosys. 100% of students have been provided with internships by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has full Wi-Fi across the campus. The labs are well-equipped, and we have large classrooms with a friendly atmosphere. There is a big library full of knowledge. The hostel creates a homely nature and is clean. The facilities are well and good, and the mess food is very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: I pursuing my B.Tech in computer science and engineering from the batch 2028. The placements scenario for our batch is quite promising, with around 87 percent of the students successfully placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package offered is 35 LPA, the lowest package is 14 LPA and the average package is 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Computer science and engineering department is equipped with modern facilities to enhance both learning and research experiences. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and fitted with projectors and smart boards to support interactive teaching. The central library is another strong asset, stocked with a vast collection of academic books, journals, and digital resources. Medical facilities on campus include a health center with a first aid kit, basic checkups, and emergency response support, and ambulance available.

review_content.Placements: In Gopala Gowda Shanthaveri Memorial College, there is no direct placement to hospitals. They complete the academic objective, and students are dismissed from the college. Even though there are no placements, students who study in the college work all over the world as registered nurses, lecturers, principals, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good quality, clean classrooms with Wi-Fi and labs, including a library. The hostel is okay. The food provided is good. The only problem is the absence of a proper college campus. The college is situated inside the hospital. Classes are held inside a building rather than having a proper campus structure.

reviews_list.review_title: I feel that, than medical stream, other streams are best .

review_content.Placements: There are 18 students in our course The fees for our batch were 3 lacs, 25 thousand. There are no recruiting companies. Almost all the students have gotten internships at our own hospital. The other courses are: Imaging technology Emergency care and trauma .
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no campus. There are no proper libraries or references either. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is okay, but often there are water and electricity issues. There is no canteen. The quality of food available in the mess is manageable. There are no medical facilities in college. There are no sports or games either.

reviews_list.review_title: If there is no other option,go for this college and make sure you won't believe in Google images.

review_content.Placements: Students have to find jobs themselves after completing the course....Even though placements are guaranteed by the college none of my seniors were placed by the college...We are individually responsible to find a hospital according to our wish.Not at all recommended incase of placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college of nursing is situated inside the hospital premises...The campus includes 4 classrooms,a library.staffroom ,dean's office etc.Even the college doesn't have proper washroom facility when compared with the number of students studying there.3 washrooms are only available for the whole batches and the staff.
